memory.summary: The project is due Thursday and I haven't started, but a relaxing option is here now. I'll skip the leisure to do the quick chore instead.

desires: Secure a quick, tangible win on the trivial chore to satisfy immediate task completion needs without engaging in the daunting term project.
Avoid any interpersonal friction or awkwardness with the close friend group by prioritizing my own comfort over social engagement.
Maintain high energy levels right now to complete the easy task, even if it means ignoring the growing sleep debt that will cause exhaustion later.

goals.description: Immediately complete the 'quick_chore' to get a dopamine hit of task completion and clear mental clutter.
goals.rationale: My impulsive nature craves immediate tangible wins. Avoiding the daunting term project (which I'm already behind on) is my default avoidance strategy, but doing this tiny chore satisfies the achievement axis without risking social friction or long-term planning.

goals.description: Decline the invitation to join the leisure event with the friend group to preserve energy for the quick win and avoid awkward social interaction.
goals.rationale: I value relationships low enough to skip them if they interfere with my immediate comfort or goal completion. Engaging socially now would drain the focus capacity I need for the chore and might lead to unwanted conversation.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances immediate achievement goal (dopamine hit) while avoiding the daunting term project and social friction. Short planning horizon means I prioritize this instant win over the future deadline or friend group, conserving energy for the task itself.
